title: Legislature
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Legislatures''' were governmental organizations that drafted laws, and often elected the [[Head of State/Legends|Heads of State]] and/or Government. Depending on the specific government, a legislature might be referred to as a [[Council]], [[High Council]], [[Great Council]], [[Congress]], [[Ruling Council]], [[Senate]], or [[Parliament]]. Examples of legislatures included:
*[[Combined Bothan Clans|Bothan Council]], legilsature of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] and [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]].
*[[Chandrilan House]], legislature of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].
*[[Council of Elders (Cerea)|Council of Elders]], legislature of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]].
*[[Council of Moffs/Legends|Council of Moffs]], de facto legislature of the [[Imperial Remnant]].
*[[Duros High House]], legislature of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].
*[[Elders' Council]], legislature of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]].
*[[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], legislature of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
*[[Great Council (Tapani Federation)|Great Council]], legislature of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].
*[[Great Council (Yuuzhan Vong)|Great Council]], legislature of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].
*[[High Council of Alderaan]], legislature of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].
*[[Grand Hutt Council/Legends|Hutt Grand Council]], legislature of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].
*[[Jabiim Congress]], legislature of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]].
*[[Lannik High Court]], legislature of [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]].
*[[Mon Calamari Council]], legislature of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].
*[[Sullustan Council]], legislature of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]].
*[[Twi'lek Ruling Council|Twi'lek Clan Council]], legislature of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].
*[[Typha-Dor High Council]], legislature of [[Typha-Dor]].
